records.title: Catalog evidence for bounded architecture composition

evidence.description: Catalog-backed provider tests cover deterministic component selection, generic electrical mutations, real alternatives, auxiliary supplies, per-rail fail-closed current demand, capability-safe MCU GPIO allocation, component evidence, and catalog-order independence.

Reusable typed contracts, bounded provider expansion, whole-circuit constraint checks, value and tolerance solvers, stable rejection, scoring, alternatives, and rationale form the verified open-set search layer.

The five single-function and 10 adversarial multi-function architectures lower through the existing design workflow with complete placement, routing, connectivity, writer, and deterministic artifact evidence.

records.title: Frozen held-out single- and multi-function real-KiCad promotion

evidence.description: SHA-256-pinned five-requirement behavior-only corpus for threshold, protected switching, regulation, active filtering, and logic-domain translation.
Acceptance audit records clean offline and optional real-KiCad promotion plus all preserved regression lanes.
SHA-256-pinned 10-circuit behavior-only corpus containing 35 objectives, 3 abstract participants, 18 capabilities, and 23 whole-circuit constraints.
Acceptance audit records deterministic alternatives and rationale, global proofs, complete offline promotion, and clean installed-KiCad ERC and strict DRC for all 10 circuits.

records.title: Bounded single- and multi-function composition scope

evidence.description: Defines the strict v1 behavioral schema, typed compatibility, deterministic budgets, safety rules, frozen corpus, completion gates, and explicit non-goals.
Defines the v2 typed-signal and whole-circuit constraint contract, coverage states, alternatives, fail-closed behavior, adversarial corpus, promotion gates, and bounded claims.
